strong.Junker Queen: Jagged Blade's long-range pull lets her cross the open ice quickly instead of walking in exposed, and Commanding Shout's speed boost helps her whole team close distance safely. Carnage's wide swing punishes groups who bunch up fighting over the capture point, and Adrenaline Rush keeps her topped up even while exposed on the open platforms.
strong.Mauga: His 425 health plus 250 armor lets him shrug off the long-range poke this map is built around, and Overrun's unstoppable charge covers the wide-open ground fast instead of leaving him exposed mid-approach. Cardiac Overdrive then lets him and his team out-sustain whatever chip damage does connect.
strong.Shion: Her dual Kira Pistols already favor mid-range pressure, and Execution's tightened volley rewards the clean sightlines this map offers. Evade's dash-plus-overhealth gives her a way to reposition across the open platforms without simply eating a sniper's shot, and Joyride's motorbike closes gaps the frozen terrain would otherwise force her to walk.
strong.Symmetra: Sentry Turret clusters well in the tighter corridors around the point itself, slowing anyone trying to push through, and Teleporter lets her team skip the long, exposed walk across the open platforms entirely. Photon Barrier is also strong here, blocking the incoming long-range fire this map is designed to reward.
strong.Torbjörn: Deploy Turret covers the sightlines other heroes have to cross on foot, punishing anyone caught in the open. Overload's speed and firing-rate boost helps him reposition across the wide platforms when needed, and Molten Core denies the capture point itself to anyone trying to contest it.

weak.Orisa: Her kit is built to brawl at close range behind Fortify, but this map's wide-open frozen terrain means she has to cross a lot of ground with no cover before she can actually use it. Slow-moving and armored isn't the same as safe against long sightlines, and she's an easy pick before Fortify is even up.
weak.Freja: Updraft is meant to create firing angles, but on a map already covered in high ground and clean sightlines, launching herself into the air just makes her an easier target for the long-range heroes this map favors. Quick Dash helps her escape, but she has little cover to actually retreat into.
weak.Sojourn: Power Slide is a great way to reposition, but sliding across open, snow-covered platforms with no cover to break sightlines leaves her exposed mid-slide to exactly the kind of long-range fire this map rewards. She needs an angle to disrupt from, and this map doesn't offer many.
weak.Widowmaker: The map's sightlines look tailor-made for her, but the actual capture point sits in tighter terrain than the platforms around it, forcing frequent close-range contests. Grappling Hook is a short, cooldown-gated escape rather than a full retreat, so she's stuck defending a point she isn't built to hold.

Genji.summary: Can dash through the open lanes and Deflect incoming poke, but has no reliable cover once he's committed.
requires: Precise Deflect timing against the hitscan and sniper fire this map rewards
Using Swift Strike to cross open ground rather than walking it
Double jump and wall climb used to break sightlines, not just to approach
strugglesAgainst: Sustained long-range hitscan that punishes him the instant Deflect ends
Being caught mid-approach with no team dive to follow up on

Ashe.summary: The long sightlines suit her rifle, but she has no mobility to escape once she's spotted.
requires: Positioning that always leaves a fallback route off the open platforms
Landing Dynamite on grouped targets before repositioning
Coach Gun used proactively to reach high ground, not just to escape
strugglesAgainst: Flankers who close distance faster than she can reposition
Getting caught without Coach Gun up when a dive arrives

Ana.summary: Her Biotic Rifle's range fits the map, but she has almost nothing to peel for herself if she's found.
requires: Staying at max range and pre-aiming likely approach lanes
Sleep Dart held in reserve for divers rather than used offensively
Team positioning that discourages flankers from reaching her at all
strugglesAgainst: Mobile flankers who close the open ground before she can react
Being isolated from her team on the wide platforms

strong.Reinhardt: Barrier Field is built for exactly the tight indoor points this map's interior favors, and Charge punishes anyone caught out in the open between points. Fire Strike also pierces through the narrow corridors connecting each point, softening whoever's holding the next objective before his team arrives.
strong.Sigma: Experimental Barrier can be repositioned to control the sightlines between the outer poke lanes and the interior brawl points, letting him adapt as the fight shifts. Kinetic Grasp absorbs the poke damage this map's outer areas are known for, and Accretion punishes groups pushing through the tighter indoor rooms.
strong.Reaper: Wraith Form lets him ignore the poke damage crossing between capture points and walk straight into the interior brawls this map rewards. Shadow Step also skips the exposed bridges entirely, dropping him right into the close-range fights where Death Blossom and his healing passive do the most work.
strong.Symmetra: Teleporter shortens the long walk between this map's five spread-out points, and Sentry Turret slows anyone contesting the tight interior rooms. Photon Barrier blocks the outer sightline poke this map is known for, buying her brawl-focused team time to close in.
strong.Torbjörn: Deploy Turret holds down the narrow bridges and corridors connecting each of the five points, denying easy rotations. Overload's speed boost helps him keep pace with a push-and-pull map, and Molten Core punishes groups fighting over the tighter interior objectives.
strong.Zenyatta: Orb of Discord turns the brawl comps this map favors into fast picks, and Orb of Harmony's sustained healing supports a team holding an interior point under pressure. Transcendence is also strong here, letting his team push through a contested indoor room without losing the fight to poke damage along the way.

weak.Roadhog: Chain Hook wants an isolated target, but this map's tight indoor points are full of allies ready to peel the instant he pulls someone in. His single-target sustain from Take a Breather doesn't match the constant multi-point pressure of a push-and-pull map with five separate objectives to hold.
weak.Freja: This map splits into brawl-heavy interiors and poke-heavy outer sightlines, and Freja's Updraft repositioning works best in the open lanes she's weakest overall on — the tight indoor points give her little room to use Quick Dash for an angle before she's swarmed.
weak.Sojourn: Her railgun charge wants sustained sightlines, but Hanaoka's tight indoor capture points don't give her time to charge before a brawl comp is already on top of her. Power Slide helps her reposition, but there's rarely a clean angle to slide into on the interior points this map rewards.
weak.Widowmaker: The outer sightlines suit her, but this map's push-and-pull format constantly drags the fight back into brawl-heavy interior rooms she has no answer for. Grappling Hook can reach a sightline, but it can't get her out of a fight that's already moved indoors around her.

Tracer.summary: Thrives in the chaotic interior brawls, but the outer poke lanes punish her low health before she can even blink into range.
requires: Blink charges saved for escaping poke lanes, not just for engaging
Pulse Bomb saved for grouped enemies on a contested point
Recall timed to bail before overcommitting indoors
strugglesAgainst: Sustained poke damage from the outer sightlines catching her mid-rotation
Getting focused before she can close the gap to a brawl

Genji.summary: Deflect punishes the outer poke heroes, but the tight interior rooms leave him nowhere to escape a bad engage.
requires: Deflect angled correctly against ranged poke rather than melee brawlers
Swift Strike used to bail from a losing interior fight, not just to engage
Wall climbing used to skip between the map's tight corridors
strugglesAgainst: Close-range brawl comps that punish him the moment Deflect ends
Being cornered in an interior room with no reset available

requires: Exo Boots jump used proactively to reach safer positioning
Immortality Field placed before committing to a contested interior point
Positioning that isn't caught between the outer poke lane and the point
strugglesAgainst: Flanking dive that catches him before he can jump away
Sustained poke damage he can't out-heal from range

strong.Hazard: Violent Leap lets him rotate between objectives fast in a mode built entirely around rotation, and Jagged Wall can block off a street or tunnel entrance while his team resets on the next Flashpoint point. Spike Guard also holds a chokepoint between the open streets and interior tunnels well.
strong.Junker Queen: Jagged Blade's pull works in both the open streets and tighter tunnels, and Commanding Shout's speed boost is exactly what a rotation-heavy mode like Flashpoint rewards. Carnage punishes groups contesting a freshly-opened objective, and Adrenaline Rush keeps her sustained through the constant back-to-back fights.
strong.Pharah: The wide open scrap-metal streets give her plenty of room for Jump Jet's aerial angles without the tight ceilings some maps impose, and Barrage can clear an objective from above before the enemy team even finishes rotating in. Concussive Blast also punishes anyone bunched up in the open.
strong.Reaper: Shadow Step lets him rotate to the next Flashpoint objective ahead of his team, and Wraith Form covers the open streets between objectives without taking chip damage along the way. The interior tunnels also suit Death Blossom's close-range burst once he's in position.
strong.Symmetra: Teleporter is especially strong on a map with five spread-out rotating objectives, letting her team skip the open streets entirely between fights. Sentry Turret also holds a tunnel entrance well, and Photon Barrier can block incoming fire while contesting a freshly-opened point.
strong.Venture: Burrow lets them skip the open streets entirely and come up inside or behind an objective, and Drill Dash covers ground fast during the constant rotations Flashpoint demands. Clobber also punishes anyone caught off guard in the tighter tunnel sections.

weak.Freja: The wide open streets look like they'd suit Updraft's high ground angles, but Flashpoint's constant rotation means she rarely has time to set up before the fight has already moved to the next objective. Quick Dash helps her keep pace, but she's often playing catch-up rather than holding an angle.
weak.Sojourn: Her railgun wants sustained charge time, but the rotation-heavy pace of Flashpoint rarely gives her a stable sightline before the objective shifts again. Power Slide helps her keep pace with the constant movement this mode demands, but she's rarely set up in time to use her charged shot effectively.
weak.Widowmaker: The open scrap-metal streets suit her range, but the mode's fast rotations between five objectives mean she's constantly relocating rather than holding a single sightline. Grappling Hook helps her reach new angles quickly, but the interior tunnel sections she has to cross to get there leave her exposed.
weak.Ana: Biotic Grenade and Sleep Dart both want a stable position to land value from, but Flashpoint's constant rotation between objectives rarely gives her time to set up before her team has already moved on. She's frequently caught mid-rotation with no line of sight to support from.

strugglesAgainst: Getting caught mid-rotation between objectives with no cover

strugglesAgainst: Being caught alone in the open streets between objectives
Sustained ranged fire he can't Power Block through indefinitely

strong.Reinhardt: Barrier Field is built for exactly this map's defining chokepoint — the fortified bridge — and Charge punishes anyone caught in the narrow castle corridors leading up to it. Fire Strike also pierces straight down those tight hallways, softening whoever's holding the choke before his team arrives.
strong.Junkrat: Concussion Mine and Steel Trap both punish anyone forced to funnel through the map's narrow corridors and the bridge chokepoint, and there's rarely anywhere for the enemy to dodge his spam in such tight spaces. RIP-Tire can also climb the castle walls to reach the high ground above the bridge that this map is built around.
strong.Brigitte: Barrier Shield and Shield Bash both shine in a map defined by narrow chokepoints, letting her stun anyone stuck funneling through the bridge or castle corridors. Repair Pack also keeps a brawl-heavy team topped up as they push through the map's extreme chokepoints, and Rally's armor helps them survive the push.

weak.Jetpack Cat: Permanent flight is a liability in a map defined by narrow castle corridors and a single fortified bridge chokepoint — there's nowhere to fly that isn't directly into enemy sightlines from the high ground above. Frenetic Flight and Lifeline both need open space to be useful, which this tight, chokepoint-heavy map rarely offers.

Widowmaker.summary: The high ground above the bridge offers a strong sightline, but reaching it means crossing narrow castle corridors with no cover.
requires: Grappling Hook used to reach the high ground directly, skipping the exposed approach
Venom Mine placed to cover the corridor she's most likely to be flanked from
Repositioning constantly rather than holding one angle above the bridge
strugglesAgainst: Being caught in the tight corridors before reaching high ground
Dive heroes who can reach her sightline just as easily as she can

Being caught mid-flight with no barrier cover to retreat behind

Accretion also punishes groups bunched up defending a corridor chokepoint.
strong.Widowmaker: The long, winding streets give her plenty of sightline options to pick from, and the escort format means she can reposition between ambush points as the payload advances. Grappling Hook lets her quickly relocate to a new angle as the map's rotating layout demands, without losing much tempo.

weak.Reinhardt: Barrier Field is strong in the tight corridors, but the map's complex, winding layout and open ambush points make it easy for the payload's attackers to flank around him entirely rather than push into his shield. Charge is also risky to commit to blindly given how many hidden corners this map has.
weak.Roadhog: Chain Hook wants a predictable choke to fish from, but this map's winding streets and rotating ambush points give the enemy team too many angles to approach from, making it hard to commit to a single hook position. Take a Breather's sustain doesn't offset how easily he can be flanked here.

Ashe.summary: The long streets suit her rifle, but the map's rotating ambush points mean a bad angle leaves her exposed with no backup.
requires: Positioning that accounts for the map's multiple flank routes, not just the main street
Dynamite thrown into ambush points before pushing forward with the payload
Coach Gun kept ready to escape a flank rather than just to reposition
strugglesAgainst: Being flanked through one of the map's many side routes

strugglesAgainst: Being caught in an open ambush point with no wall to retreat behind

strong.Roadhog: Chain Hook can drag an enemy toward one of this map's dramatic cliffs for an instant elimination off the edge, turning the map's own knockback-friendly design into his advantage. Take a Breather also helps him survive contesting the exposed open points.
strong.Wrecking Ball: Roll and Grappling Claw let him cross the open circular points quickly and build the momentum needed to boop enemies off the map's dramatic cliffs. Piledriver punishes groups clustered on a point, and Adaptive Shield keeps him durable even without a barrier to hide behind.
strong.Pharah: Jump Jet lets her claim high ground above the open circular points, staying safely out of range of the knockback abilities that threaten grounded heroes near the map's dramatic cliffs. Barrage can also clear a point from above.

weak.Reinhardt: Barrier Field cannot stop a well-timed knockback from a flank angle, and this map's dramatic cliffs punish his lack of self-mobility badly. Charge is also risky to commit blindly given how many edges there are to be knocked into.
weak.Sigma: Experimental Barrier helps him control an angle, but his own low mobility makes him just as vulnerable to the knockback abilities this map's cliffs are built around as the tanks he is meant to counter.
weak.Orisa: Fortify reduces incoming damage, but it does not stop a knockback from carrying her toward one of this map's dramatic cliffs, and her slow-moving push style is exactly what this map is built to punish.

D.Va.summary: Her large hitbox makes her an easy target for the knockback abilities this map's cliffs are built around, even with Defense Matrix up.

Defense Matrix reserved for burst knockback abilities specifically
Constant awareness of her positioning relative to every ledge
strugglesAgainst: Knockback abilities that can shove her off a cliff despite her health pool
Being isolated near an edge with no team support

strong.Soldier: 76: Helix Rockets and his hitscan rifle both do work across the open intersections this map's push crosses, and Biotic Field lets him sustain a brawl-heavy push without rotating back for healing. Sprint also helps him reposition quickly between the open sections and sheltered alcoves.

weak.Sigma: Experimental Barrier controls ground-level sightlines, but the high ground flanks this map rewards for mobile heroes let attackers bypass it entirely.
weak.Ana: Sleep Dart and Biotic Grenade both want a stable position, but the high ground flanks this map rewards for mobile heroes give her little warning before a diver reaches her directly.

Deflect timed against the map's open-intersection poke
Swift Strike saved for repositioning rather than only engaging

Sustained close-range pressure once Deflect is down

strong.Reinhardt: Barrier Field is built for exactly this map's defining chokepoint on the high street, and Charge punishes anyone caught out of position. Fire Strike also pierces the indoor final stretches, softening defenders before his team arrives — it's no surprise he's considered the king of this map.
strong.Zarya: Particle Barrier and Projected Barrier both charge up fast in the close-range brawl this map's chokepoints create, and Graviton Surge punishes groups bottlenecked on the high street or in the indoor final stretches.
strong.Bastion: Configuration: Assault's high damage output punishes anyone funneling through the high street chokepoint, and A-36 Tactical Grenade denies the indoor final stretches. His durability holds up well in this brawl-heavy map.
strong.Cassidy: Peacekeeper threatens the high street chokepoint, and Combat Roll lets him reposition between cover. Flashbang also sets up picks on anyone caught pushing through the indoor final stretches.
strong.Emre: Cyber Frag pressures corners along the high street chokepoint, and Siphon Blaster's mobility helps him close distance for the close-range brawl the indoor final stretches demand.
strong.Hanzo: Sonic Arrow reveals anyone approaching the high street chokepoint, and Storm Arrows punishes groups bottlenecked there. Lunge also helps him find an angle in the tighter indoor final stretches.
strong.Junkrat: Concussion Mine and Steel Trap both punish anyone funneling through the high street chokepoint, and there's rarely anywhere for the enemy to dodge his spam in such tight spaces. RIP-Tire also threatens the indoor final stretches.
strong.Mei: Ice Wall can seal off the high street chokepoint entirely, and Cryo-Freeze lets her survive a brawl at the indoor final stretches. Her slow movement speed matters less in a map built around holding a single chokepoint.
strong.Reaper: Wraith Form lets him ignore poke crossing toward the high street chokepoint and walk straight into the brawl. Shadow Step also skips straight to the indoor final stretches, where Death Blossom does the most work.
strong.Symmetra: Sentry Turret holds the high street chokepoint well, and Teleporter shortens the walk to the indoor final stretches. Photon Barrier also blocks incoming fire while her team pushes through.
strong.Torbjörn: Deploy Turret holds down the high street chokepoint, denying easy pushes. Overload's speed helps him rotate, and Molten Core punishes groups fighting over the indoor final stretches.
strong.Vendetta: Whirlwind Dash and Projected Edge both threaten anyone bottlenecked at the high street chokepoint, and Soaring Slice helps her close distance for the brawl the indoor final stretches demand.
strong.Venture: Burrow lets them skip the high street chokepoint entirely and come up behind the defending team at the indoor final stretches. Drill Dash also punishes groups caught off guard.
strong.Ana: Sleep Dart and Biotic Grenade both land reliably in the close-range brawl this map's chokepoints create, since enemies are rarely far enough away to dodge them.
strong.Baptiste: Regenerative Burst keeps a brawling team topped up pushing through the high street chokepoint, and Immortality Field buys crucial time at the indoor final stretches.
strong.Brigitte: Barrier Shield and Shield Bash both shine at the high street chokepoint, letting her stun anyone stuck funneling through. Repair Pack also keeps her team topped up pushing into the indoor final stretches.
strong.Mizuki: Healing Kasa's bounce suits a grouped brawl team holding the high street chokepoint, and Binding Chain punishes anyone trying to flank around it toward the indoor final stretches.
strong.Moira: Biotic Orb can bounce around the tight corners of the high street chokepoint to reach allies indirectly, and Fade helps her survive a close-range brawl at the indoor final stretches.
strong.Zenyatta: Orb of Discord turns the chokepoint brawl into fast picks, and Orb of Harmony's sustained healing supports a team holding the high street. Transcendence helps his team push through the indoor final stretches.

weak.D.Va: Boosters want open ground to dive across, but this map's tight chokepoints and indoor final stretches give her fewer clean dive lanes than a fully open map would. She's forced to commit through narrower spaces than her kit prefers.
weak.Domina: Barrier Array's segmented panels want room to angle across, but this map's tight high street chokepoint gives her less flexibility than a more open map would, and the indoor final stretches favor melee brawlers over her ranged kit.
weak.Winston: Jump Pack wants room to dive into a backline, but this map's tight chokepoints and indoor final stretches give him fewer clean dive lanes, and Barrier Projector doesn't hold up as well against sustained brawl damage as an actual frontline shield.
weak.Wrecking Ball: Grappling Claw wants open terrain to build speed across, but this map's tight high street chokepoint and indoor final stretches give him less room to use his swing effectively than a more open map would.
weak.Echo: Flight wants open airspace to threaten from, but this map's tight chokepoints and indoor final stretches give her little room to use it, forcing her into the close-range brawls her kit isn't built for.
weak.Sombra: Translocator and Stealth both want open space to flank through, but this map's tight high street chokepoint and indoor final stretches give her fewer flanking routes than a more open map would.
weak.Jetpack Cat: Permanent flight is a liability at this map's defining high street chokepoint and indoor final stretches — there's nowhere to fly that isn't directly into the brawl this map is built around.

Pharah.summary: The high street's early section gives her some room to fly, but the indoor final stretches strip away her airspace entirely.
requires: Jump Jet used aggressively before the fight reaches the indoor sections
Barrage saved for groups caught in the open high street
Adjusting to ground-level play once the brawl moves indoors
strugglesAgainst: Losing her aerial advantage completely at the indoor final stretches
Being forced into the close-range brawl her kit isn't built for

Ashe.summary: Her rifle threatens the open high street, but the tight chokepoint and indoor final stretches leave her without the range she depends on.
requires: Repositioning ahead of the push before it reaches the chokepoint
Dynamite used to soften defenders in the open sections
Coach Gun kept ready to escape once the fight moves indoors
strugglesAgainst: Losing her range advantage at the chokepoint and indoor stretches
Brawl comps closing distance faster than she can reposition

Tracer.summary: Thrives in chaotic brawls generally, but this map's single dominant chokepoint means one bad Blink can leave her isolated from her team.
requires: Blink charges saved for escaping a bad engage at the chokepoint
Pulse Bomb saved for grouped enemies defending the high street
Recall timed to bail before overcommitting
strugglesAgainst: Being isolated at the chokepoint with no team to back her up
Sustained brawl damage her low health can't absorb

strong.D.Va: Boosters let her dive the long runway straights this map's sniper nests dominate, closing distance before they can land a clean shot. Defense Matrix also absorbs the sniper fire she takes getting there.
strong.Winston: Jump Pack lets him close the long runway straights and reach the vertical cliff faces snipers use as nests, shutting down the sniper's paradise this map is known for. Barrier Projector also gives his team cover along the exposed payload route.
strong.Echo: Flight lets her contest the vertical cliff faces snipers use as nests, and Sticky Bombs punish anyone caught on the limited-cover payload route. Focusing Beam finishes off targets she catches out of position.
strong.Freja: Updraft lets her reach the vertical cliff faces this map's sniper nests occupy, contesting the same high ground. Take Aim also threatens the long runway straights from up there.
strong.Sierra: Anchor Drone gives her flexible repositioning along the long runway straights, and Tracking Shot helps her hold pressure on this sniper-favored map. Tremor Charge punishes groups caught on the limited-cover payload route.
strong.Sombra: Translocator and Stealth both help her bypass the long runway straights this map's sniper nests dominate, reaching the backline without exposing herself to the sniper's paradise this map is known for.
strong.Ana: Her Biotic Rifle's range fits the long runway straights, and Sleep Dart can pick off a diving flanker before they reach her team on the limited-cover payload route.
strong.Illari: Healing Pylon can be tucked against the vertical cliff faces while she pokes down the long runway straights. Outburst also helps her create distance if a fight gets uncomfortably close on the exposed payload route.
strong.Juno: Glide Boost's aerial mobility helps her contest the vertical cliff faces snipers use as nests, and Hyper Ring helps her team cross the long runway straights fast. Pulsar Torpedoes also keep a team topped up under sustained sniper pressure.
strong.Mercy: Guardian Angel lets her stay attached to a team crossing the exposed payload route, and Resurrect can undo a bad pick from the sniper nests this map is known for. Valkyrie also helps her team survive the long runway straights.

weak.Mauga: His high health helps him tank some sniper fire, but Overrun's charge has a long way to travel down the runway straights before it reaches anything, and the limited cover on the payload route leaves him exposed the whole way.
weak.Orisa: Fortify helps her survive some poke, but this map's long runway straights and distant sniper nests punish her slow-moving push hard, and the limited cover on the payload route gives her nowhere to safely advance from.
weak.Reinhardt: Barrier Field is strong, but this map's vertical cliff faces give snipers angles that can shoot over or around his shield, and the long runway straights mean he's exposed crossing ground his barrier can't fully cover.
weak.Zarya: Particle Barrier and Projected Barrier both want sustained fights to charge from, but this sniper's paradise punishes slow charge-building with picks before she can meaningfully use her energy.
weak.Bastion: Configuration: Assault hits hard in a straight line, but the long runway straights work both ways — the distant sniper nests this map is known for can pick him off just as easily as he threatens them.
weak.Cassidy: Peacekeeper works at range, but this map's distant sniper nests and long runway straights outrange him without a way to safely close the gap, especially with such limited cover on the payload route.
weak.Emre: Cyber Frag pressures corners well, but this map's sniper's paradise reputation means there are few corners to hide behind on the long runway straights and exposed payload route.
weak.Torbjörn: Deploy Turret is an easy target for the distant sniper nests this map is known for, and the long runway straights give him little cover to protect it or himself.
weak.Lifeweaver: Life Grip and Petal Platform both help a grounded team, but the long runway straights and distant sniper nests punish exposure so heavily that his support kit struggles to keep pace with the picks.

Widowmaker.summary: This map looks tailor-made for her, but facing other snipers on the same long runway straights means whoever wins the sightline duel first often decides the fight.
requires: Winning the positioning race to the best sniper nest before the enemy does
Grappling Hook used to reach the vertical cliff faces quickly
Venom Mine placed to deny a contested nest
strugglesAgainst: Enemy snipers who claim the best angle first
Being dislodged from a nest by a diving flanker

Genji.summary: Deflect can shut down some of the sniper fire this map is known for, but the long runway straights leave him exposed far more often than he's actually deflecting.
requires: Deflect timed specifically against the distant sniper nests
Wall climbing used to reach the vertical cliff faces for a flank
Swift Strike saved to close distance rather than to bail in the open
strugglesAgainst: Sustained sniper fire down the long runway straights
Being caught on the exposed payload route with no Deflect up

Baptiste.summary: Regenerative Burst and Immortality Field both support a team through sniper poke, but he has little personal escape if a flanker reaches him on the exposed payload route.
requires: Exo Boots jump used to reach safer positioning quickly
Immortality Field placed before committing to the runway straights
Positioning that avoids the map's longest sightlines
strugglesAgainst: Flanking dive that catches him before he can jump away
Sustained sniper fire he can't out-heal from range

strong.Junker Queen: Jagged Blade's pull can drag an enemy toward the map's dramatic terrain drops, and Commanding Shout's speed lets her team cross the open circular points quickly. Carnage also punishes groups bunched up on a point.
strong.Mauga: His high health and armor let him tank the open point fights this map rewards, and Overrun's charge covers the circular points fast, punishing anyone caught near a terrain drop.
strong.Reinhardt: Barrier Field controls the open circular points, and Charge can punish or even knock enemies toward the map's dramatic terrain drops. Fire Strike also pierces across the open point to soften defenders.
strong.Anran: Fan the Flames and Inferno Rush both threaten the open circular points this map rewards for mobile heroes, and Dancing Blaze lets her dodge return fire near a dangerous terrain drop.
strong.Brigitte: Shield Bash can knock an enemy toward this map's dramatic terrain drops, and Barrier Shield controls the open circular points. Repair Pack also keeps her team topped up fighting over an exposed point.
strong.Illari: Healing Pylon can be tucked safely while she supports a team fighting over the open circular points, and Outburst's knockback punishes anyone standing too close to a terrain drop.

weak.D.Va: Boosters give her mobility, but her large hitbox makes her an easier target for the knockback abilities this map specifically rewards near its dramatic terrain drops. Defense Matrix doesn't stop a well-timed shove off the edge.
weak.Orisa: Fortify helps her survive some knockback, but this map's open circular points and terrain drops still punish her slow-moving push before she can meaningfully contest the objective.
weak.Freja: Updraft looks suited to this map's open terrain, but the knockback abilities this map specifically rewards can just as easily punish her for putting herself in the air near a dangerous drop.
weak.Sojourn: Her railgun wants sustained sightlines, but this map's open circular points don't offer a stable angle for long before a knockback-heavy fight forces her to reposition.
weak.Widowmaker: The open circular points look like they'd suit her range, but this map's terrain drops mean a single knockback can end her positioning entirely, and she has little to answer that threat with beyond Grappling Hook.

Ramattra.summary: Ravenous Vortex can pull enemies together near a terrain drop, but Nemesis Form's lack of self-mobility makes him just as vulnerable to being knocked off himself.
requires: Positioning that keeps him away from cliff edges while in Nemesis Form
Void Barrier used to block incoming knockback abilities before they land
Team support to peel divers who bypass his barrier
strugglesAgainst: Knockback abilities that can shove him off the open point
Mobile heroes who can outmaneuver him around the terrain drops

Zarya.summary: Her barriers charge up fast in the open point fights this map rewards, but she has no self-mobility to avoid being knocked toward a terrain drop herself.
requires: Positioning with an escape route away from any nearby cliff edge
Barriers timed to absorb incoming knockback abilities before they land
Graviton Surge used to punish groups fighting near a drop
strugglesAgainst: Knockback abilities that can shove her off the open point
Being isolated from her team near a dangerous edge

Roadhog.summary: Chain Hook can pull an enemy toward a terrain drop for an easy elimination, but he's just as vulnerable to being knocked off the point himself.
requires: Hooking toward the point center, not toward a nearby cliff edge
Constant awareness of his own positioning relative to every drop
Take a Breather timed around burst windows rather than pure sustain
strugglesAgainst: Knockback effects that can throw him off the open point
Mobile divers who can outmaneuver him around the terrain drops

strong.Doomfist: Rocket Punch can knock enemies into the high-traffic road through City Center for extra damage, and Seismic Slam creates space in the indoor laboratories. Power Block also helps him cross the outdoor garden plazas safely.
strong.Anran: Fan the Flames and Inferno Rush both threaten the outdoor garden plazas this map's sub-maps offer, and Dancing Blaze lets her dodge return fire near City Center's dangerous knockback zone.
strong.Genji: Double jump and wall climb suit the mix of indoor laboratories and outdoor garden plazas across this map's three sub-maps. Deflect and Swift Strike also help him navigate City Center's high-traffic road safely.
strong.Shion: Her dual pistols suit the mid-range engagements in the outdoor garden plazas, and Execution's tightened volley punishes groups in the indoor laboratories. Joyride's motorbike also helps her cross City Center quickly.
strong.Tracer: Blink's short bursts let her cross City Center's dangerous high-traffic road without lingering, and Pulse Bomb punishes groups bunched up in the indoor laboratories or garden plazas.
strong.Jetpack Cat: Permanent flight sidesteps the knockback danger of City Center's high-traffic road entirely, and Frenetic Flight helps reposition across the outdoor garden plazas quickly.
strong.Kiriko: Wall climb and Swift Step both help her navigate the indoor laboratories and outdoor garden plazas safely, avoiding City Center's dangerous knockback zone. Protection Suzu also cleanses crowd control near the road.
strong.Lifeweaver: Life Grip can pull a teammate back from City Center's dangerous high-traffic road before a knockback finishes the job, and Petal Platform helps his team navigate the outdoor garden plazas safely.
strong.Lúcio: Wall Ride lets him navigate the indoor laboratories and outdoor garden plazas at speed, and Soundwave's knockback can be used offensively near City Center's dangerous road instead of just defensively.
strong.Wuyang: Rushing Torrent's speed and jump help him navigate the mix of indoor laboratories and outdoor garden plazas safely, and his fast health regeneration suits the mobile playstyle this map's knockback dangers reward.

weak.Hanzo: Sonic Arrow and Storm Arrows both want sustained sightlines, but the mix of indoor laboratories and outdoor garden plazas across this map's sub-maps rarely gives him one for long before the fight shifts terrain.
weak.Ana: Biotic Grenade and Sleep Dart both want a stable position to land value from, but the constant shift between indoor laboratories and outdoor garden plazas gives her little time to set up before the fight moves to different terrain.

Reinhardt.summary: Barrier Field is strong indoors, but City Center's high-traffic road makes the knockback abilities this map is known for especially dangerous to his lack of mobility.
requires: Positioning that avoids the exposed road when not actively holding a barrier
Charge used cautiously, since being knocked back into traffic is a real risk
Team support to peel divers who bypass his shield
strugglesAgainst: Knockback abilities that can shove him into City Center's dangerous road
Mobile heroes who bypass his barrier for a pick

Zarya.summary: Her barriers charge up well in the indoor labs, but she has no self-mobility to avoid the knockback danger City Center's high-traffic road specifically punishes.
requires: Positioning with an escape route away from the road
Barriers timed to absorb incoming knockback before it lands
Graviton Surge used to punish groups near the dangerous road
strugglesAgainst: Knockback abilities that can shove her into City Center's traffic
Being isolated from her team near the road

Roadhog.summary: Chain Hook can pull an enemy into City Center's dangerous road for an easy pick, but he's just as vulnerable to being knocked into it himself.
requires: Hooking toward safer terrain, not toward the high-traffic road
Constant awareness of his positioning relative to the road
Take a Breather timed around burst windows rather than pure sustain
strugglesAgainst: Knockback effects that can throw him into City Center's traffic
Mobile heroes who can outmaneuver him near the road
